'''Din Tinray''' was a deaf, [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]]. Since deaf Sullustans were not active at all, she went to see a physician for help, [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Rachael Tikaris]]. Tikaris was able to create an ear for her, and after surgery, Din was welcomed back into society.
